validate.notes: Fixed solve.sh verification logic. The script was checking for fix in the wrong place - it was finding the pattern in validIdentifierRegex (which already had it) instead of validIdentifierWithDotRegex. Changed verification to use Python script that specifically checks the validIdentifierWithDotRegex section. All 4 F2P tests fail on base (reward=0), all 8 tests pass on gold (reward=1). Rubric judge requires LLM API key which is not available in this environment.
